# Support

## Getting Help

If you need help with Nexora, here are the available support channels:

### Documentation

- **Official Docs**: [nexora.dev/docs](https://nexora.dev/docs)
- **API Reference**: [nexora.dev/api](https://nexora.dev/api)
- **Examples**: [nexora.dev/examples](https://nexora.dev/examples)
- **Blog**: [nexora.dev/blog](https://nexora.dev/blog)

### Community

- **Discord**: [discord.gg/opennexora](https://discord.gg/opennexora)
  - General discussion
  - Help & support
  - Feature requests
  - Showcase your projects
- **GitHub Discussions**: [github.com/opennexora/nexora-runtime/discussions](https://github.com/opennexora/nexora-runtime/discussions)
  - Q&A
  - Ideas
  - Show and tell

### Social Media

- **Twitter**: [@opennexora](https://twitter.com/opennexora)
- **YouTube**: [OpenNexora](https://youtube.com/@opennexora)
- **Blog**: [nexora.dev/blog](https://nexora.dev/blog)

## Issue Tracking

### Bug Reports

If you've found a bug, please [open an issue](https://github.com/opennexora/nexora-runtime/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) with:

- Clear description
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Environment details

### Feature Requests

Have an idea? [Request a feature](https://github.com/opennexora/nexora-runtime/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) with:

- Problem statement
- Proposed solution
- Use case
- Alternatives considered

### Package Requests

Need a package ported? [Request a package](https://github.com/opennexora/nexora-runtime/issues/new?template=package_request.md) with:

- Package name and npm link
- Description and use case
- Current compatibility status

## Commercial Support

For enterprise or commercial support inquiries, contact:

- **Email**: enterprise@nexora.dev
- **Website**: [nexora.dev/enterprise](https://nexora.dev/enterprise)

Services include:

- Priority bug fixes
- Custom feature development
- Migration assistance
- Training and consulting
- Dedicated support engineer

## Security Issues

For security vulnerabilities, please see our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md).

**Do NOT report security issues through public GitHub issues.**

## Code of Conduct

Please follow our [Code of Conduct](https://nexora.dev/code-of-conduct) in all interactions.

## Response Times

| Channel | Expected Response Time |
|:--------|:----------------------|
| GitHub Issues | 1-3 business days |
| Discord | Usually within hours |
| Email | 1-2 business days |
| Enterprise Support | 4 hours (business hours) |

## Contributing

Want to help improve Nexora? Check out our [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md).
